title: IT Operations & Technical Support
description: Supported daily IT operations and end users, monitored CCTV systems, diagnosed and resolved basic networking and system issues, and ensured smooth operation of business-critical systems.

title: Payroll Operations & Reporting
description: Managed payroll processing and monthly payroll closure activities using Softex system. Prepared payroll reports, maintained employee records, ensured data accuracy, and handled confidential payroll information while supporting operational reporting through Microsoft Excel.
